title: Random Timed Events
description: A plugin that adds random events that remain for a set amount of time
body:
# Random Timed Events 🎲⏳

**Bring variety to your Minecraft server with completely random events!**  
Every few minutes random event starts – most of them are challenging but some are helpful.
Perfect for survival, challenge servers, or just spicing up regular gameplay.  

---

## ✨ Features

- 🎲 **Random Event System** – automatic or force started
- ⏳ **BossBar Countdown** – everyone knows when the chaos starts
![BossBar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PinkCandyDev/Random-Timed-Events/main/bossbar.png)
- ⚙️ **Simple Config** – toggle events, set durations, adjust timers  
- 🛠️ **Easy Commands** – pause, resume, restart or force start an event  

## 🕹️ Example Events
- **ADHDInventory** – your hotbar gets scrambled when you switch items  
- **MoveOrDie** – stand still too long and you’ll take damage  
- **NoJumping** – gravity feels heavier than ever  
- **RandomTeleport** – suddenly, you’re somewhere else…  
- **DeadGoBoom** – mobs and players explode on death
![DeadGoBoom](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PinkCandyDev/Random-Timed-Events/main/DeadGoBoom.gif)
---

## 🎮 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/rte timer` | Check remaining time until the next event |
| `/rte restart` | Restart the countdown timer |
| `/rte pause` | Pause the timer |
| `/rte resume` | Resume the timer |
| `/rte stop` | Stop the current event |
| `/rte start <EventName>` | Force start a specific event |
| `/rte help` | Display list of available commands |

---

## ⚡ Compatibility
- Works on **Bukkit, Spigot, Paper**  
- Two builds available:  
  - **Older:** 1.14.4 – 1.20.3  
  - **Newer:** 1.20.4 – 1.21.8
